rows.label: qev087306_MSG0001
rows.name:
Thank you, all... I still can't believe
the secretary himself came for me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0002
rows.name: Hmm? What are you talking about?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0003
rows.name: What? But that was... I'm sure I saw—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0004
rows.name: Ah, are you referring to the rescue effort?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0005
rows.name:
I just read the report. It seems Elma and
her team performed admirably, as always.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0006
rows.name:
Apparently they had some extra
assistance this time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0007
rows.name:
But all the more credit to their leader
for bringing the right people together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0009
rows.name: You really okay with leaving it at that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'd say you just heard your answer
direct from the source, yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0011
rows.name:
Tatsu surprised how useful Nagi was. Maaaybe
even consider letting Nagi help again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev087306_MSG0012
rows.name:
Is that so? Then I await
that day with bated breath.[ST:wait ]
